objective:
[Scalp de continuation / micro-retournement] sur [crypto liquide] [5m ou 15m].
Indicateurs : [EMA 9/21/50] + [RSI 14] + [Bandes de Bollinger 20,2].
Entrées : [pullback vers EMA 21 avec RSI repartant dans le sens de la micro-tendance et rejet d’une bande] / [excès sur bande externe avec RSI en surachat/survente et signal de retournement court terme].
Sorties : [take-profit sur extension vers bande opposée ou prochain niveau de structure] / [sortie anticipée si clôture franche contre la position ou divergence RSI].
Risk management : [stop-loss sous dernier plus bas/haut local ou 1× ATR] / [ratio minimum 1,5] / [risque fixe 1–2 % du capital par trade].

iterations.hypothesis: This strategy exploits micro-retournement patterns in liquid crypto markets by combining RSI momentum with Bollinger Band rejections to identify high-probability scalp entries. The EMA 21 acts as a dynamic support/resistance filter, ensuring entries align with the prevailing micro-trend. RSI confirms momentum reversal after pullback to EMA 21, while Bollinger rejections provide precise entry signals. ATR-based stop-loss and take-profit ensure risk management aligned with volatility, maximizing risk-reward ratios in fast-moving crypto environments.

iterations.hypothesis: This strategy exploits short-term momentum shifts in liquid crypto markets by combining EMA crossovers with RSI divergence and Bollinger Band rejections. The EMA 21 acts as a dynamic support/resistance filter, RSI confirms trend strength and reversal signals, and Bollinger Bands provide precise entry/exit points with volatility-adjusted stops. This combination captures micro-retournement patterns with high precision while maintaining robust risk management through ATR-based stops and fixed risk per trade.

iterations.hypothesis: This strategy capitalizes on micro-retournement patterns in liquid crypto markets by combining EMA crossovers with RSI momentum and Bollinger Band rejections. The EMA 21 acts as a dynamic support/resistance level, while RSI confirms trend continuation or reversal. When price pulls back to EMA 21 with RSI turning up in an uptrend, or down in a downtrend, and simultaneously rejects the upper/lower Bollinger band, it signals a strong continuation or reversal setup. The ATR-based stop-loss ensures dynamic risk management, while the take-profit is set at 3x ATR or at the opposite Bollinger band, capturing maximum profit with controlled risk.
